data.name: Smart Temperature Vibrator
data.desc: Food-grade silicone, 10 vibration modes, smart temperature control, quiet motor, USB magnetic charging, 2-hour battery. Waterproof for bath use.

data.name: Ultra Realistic Massager Pro
data.desc: Bio-mimetic design with skin-like texture. Bendable inner skeleton. Suitable for all experience levels — a must-have starter.

data.name: Long Distance Couple Egg
data.desc: APP remote control, perfect for long-distance couples. Ultra quiet, multiple modes.

data.name: Luxury Leather Blindfold Set
data.desc: Premium genuine leather, soft lining, adjustable strap. Comes with silk restraints. Explore your senses.

data.name: Water-based Lubricant 200ml
data.desc: Gentle formula, no irritation, odorless & transparent. Compatible with condoms and toys. Easy to wash off.

data.name: G-Spot Vibrator
data.desc: Unique curved tip for precise G-spot stimulation. 20 vibration frequencies to suit every need.

data.name: Double-Ended Strap-On
data.desc: Couple dual-use design, wearable. Simultaneous dual stimulation for enhanced shared experience.

data.name: Feather Tease Kit
data.desc: Soft feather touch, from gentle strokes to teasing. Perfect for foreplay and sensory exploration. Includes storage pouch.

features.title: Why Choose Us

privacy.title: Absolute Privacy
privacy.desc: Neutral packaging with no sensitive labels. The shipping label shows only your delivery info — your privacy is fully protected.

safety.title: Safe Materials
safety.desc: All products use food-grade silicone and ABS eco-friendly materials, certified by SGS and international safety standards.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.desc: Round-the-clock customer service. Any product questions or usage inquiries — we are here for you anytime.

returns.title: 30-Day Returns
returns.desc: Not satisfied within 30 days? Return or exchange. Your satisfaction is our only commitment.
